retry_reason: The refcount decrement is unconditional and always succeeds from the caller's perspective; the caller has released its reference and must not retry the same put.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases one reference on a dpll_pin object. It also frees the tracker association passed as the second argument. If the reference count drops to zero, the pin is fully destroyed (removed from the global XArray, internal XArrays destroyed, properties freed, etc.). The caller must not access the pin after this call. The function is typically called with appropriate synchronization (e.g., a lock protecting the pin's refcount) to prevent concurrent access during cleanup.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is reference-count management: it decrements the refcount of a dpll_pin and frees the object when the count reaches zero. All other operations (tracker free, XArray cleanup) are part of the release lifecycle and are executed only upon final dereference.
